notes: TEMPLATE — Google Ads. As of 2026-05-27, the Joveo Social Ops Supermetrics team did NOT have Google Ads connected (ds_user 26444438121908309 returned QUERY_AUTH_UNAVAILABLE for ds_id=AW). To activate: (1) add Google Ads as a data source in Supermetrics Hub, (2) duplicate this file as <client>.json, (3) fill in Google customer ID in ds_accounts, (4) fix the field names if Supermetrics returns different headers. The backend field aliases already cover Google's standard field names — if a field isn't found it'll just be empty.
